name: freezing-v1
description: freeze locks state; mutation raises; let-mutable scoped; cannot-freeze-live
runner: pending — future phase; hand-verify via REPL until moof conform <manifest.json> exists

triples.name: freeze-and-frozen-query
triples.note: freeze is idempotent; frozen? returns #true after freeze

triples.name: mutation-after-freeze-raises
triples.note: slot mutation on a frozen form raises 'frozen-form

triples.name: let-mutable-result-is-frozen
triples.note: let-mutable evaluates body with mutable binding; freezes the form at scope EXIT (after body returns). inside body, frozen? is #false. the let-mutable form's return value is body's value (here #false), not the now-frozen form. to verify the form is frozen AFTER let-mutable returns, you must bind it: see next triple.

triples.name: let-mutable-form-is-frozen-after-scope
triples.note: after let-mutable exits, the bound form is frozen. attempting [p slot: 'x put: 2] after this point would raise 'frozen-form.

triples.name: freezable-on-foreign-handle-returns-false
triples.note: ForeignHandle forms are live faces; freezable? returns #false per spec §4.5
